note: Råpoäng → skalpoäng (0.0–2.0). Each verbal/kvant del is normed separately; total = mean of the two dels, rounded to nearest 0.05. UHR publishes an exact normeringstabell per administration; until those are seeded here, 'default' is an APPROXIMATE curve and results are labeled 'uppskattat'.

per_administration._note: Add exact UHR normeringstabeller here keyed by prov id, e.g. "2024-04": { verbal:[[raw,scaled],...], kvant:[...] }. When present, used instead of default.
